title: How AI Tools Have Helped Reduce the Burden of Teachers
description: The education sector has undergone a significant transformation in recent years, driven largely by the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI). For teachers, who traditionally juggle multiple responsibilities such as lesson planning, grading, administrative tasks, and student engagement, AI tools have emerged as a powerful solution to reduce workload and improve efficiency.
